title: Getting Started with synadam
text: synadam generates synthetic ADaM (Analysis Data Model) datasets real clinical trial data, removing identifiable patient information preserving structure original datasets. Important: synthetic data produced synadam realistic. Values generated match structural characteristics ranges original data preserve statistical distributions. package designed use cases exact values matter, : Testing generation clinical tables. Validating data processing pipelines. Developing debugging analysis code without access real patient data.

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: synadam uses two-phase “glimpse--simulate” approach: Glimpse: Extract statistical summaries real data (ranges, unique values, NA patterns). Simulate: Generate synthetic data summaries. provides clear, traceable interface real synthetic data, allowing users reviewers inspect exactly information retained.

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: prefer full control (need fine-tune auto-generated draft), author YAML hand. schema supports four dataset types: Note: Optional fields can set [] omitted entirely.
code: output_dir: "/path/to/output_directory" seed: 42  datasets:   adsl:     dataset_type: "adsl"     path: "/path/to/adsl.sas7bdat"     id_cols: [USUBJID, SUBJID]     treatment_cols: [TRT01A, TRT01AN]     flag_cols: [SAFFL, ITTFL, EFFFL]         # Optional     ordered_col_sets: [[REGION1, REGION1N]]   # Optional    adlb:     dataset_type: "bds"     path: "/path/to/adlb.sas7bdat"     id_cols: [USUBJID]     param_cols: [PARAM, PARAMCD]     visit_cols: [AVISIT, AVISITN]            # Optional     flag_cols: [ANL01FL]                     # Optional    adae:     dataset_type: "occds"     path: "/path/to/adae.sas7bdat"     id_cols: [USUBJID]     seq_col: AESEQ     ordered_col_sets: [[AEBODSYS, AEDECOD]]  # Optional    adtte:     dataset_type: "tte"     path: "/path/to/adtte.sas7bdat"     param_cols: [PARAM, PARAMCD]     censor_cols: [CNSR, EVNTDESC, CNSDTDSC]  # Optional

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: control, call glimpse_*() simulate_*() functions directly: BDS, OCCDS, TTE datasets: glimpse_bds() / simulate_bds() — longitudinal data (ADLB, ADVS) glimpse_occds() / simulate_occds() — occurrence data (ADAE, ADCM) glimpse_tte() / simulate_tte() — time--event data (ADTTE) See ?glimpse_bds, ?glimpse_occds, ?glimpse_tte full documentation.

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: synadam implements multiple privacy mechanisms: Structure, values: Preserves column names, unique values, ranges, distributions clinical patterns. Singleton removal: Unique values combinations appearing excluded replaced common values. NA noise: 5% NA positions randomly flipped prevent exact pattern reproduction.

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: Synthetic data synadam suitable : Realistic simulations — preserve statistical distributions. Statistical analysis — results reflect real clinical findings. Regulatory submissions — unless explicitly approved.

title: Getting Started with synadam
text: ⚠️ Users responsible correctly specifying column categories configuration. Incorrect configuration can result private data leaking synthetic data. ID columns (id_cols): Must include subject identifiers. Ordered column sets (ordered_col_sets): include minimum sets related columns required use case. Always review configuration carefully validate synthetic data contain identifiable information sharing outside GxP environments.

title: Generate Synthetic ADaM Datasets
text: Generate synthetic ADaM (Analysis Data Model) datasets real clinical trial data. synadam preserves structure real ADaM datasets (column names, relationships, ranges) removing identifiable patient information — enabling development testing analysis pipelines without access real data.

title: Generate Synthetic ADaM Datasets
text: Privacy-preserving: Synthetic data maintains structure without exposing identifiable patient information. Multiple dataset types: Supports ADSL, BDS (e.g. ADLB), OCCDS (e.g. ADAE), TTE (e.g. ADTTE). Auto-configuration: generate_study_config() scans ADaM directory infers dataset types column roles automatically. Reproducible: Deterministic output via random seeds.

Review the generated YAML, then simulate simulate_study(yaml_path)

title: Generate a draft study config YAML from a directory of ADaM files. — generate_study_config
text: Filename match (case-insensitive, basename without extension): starts adsl -> adsl starts adae/adcm/admh/addv -> occds starts adtte -> tte name (including ad*) -> fall column inspection Column inspection rules (checked order; USUBJID required every ADaM dataset, used discriminator). ADSL classified filename - non-adsl* file lacks BDS/TTE/OCCDS column signatures falls "REVIEW": PARAM -> bds (checked CNSR oncology hybrid datasets like ADRECIST carry TTE-derived parameters inline classify longitudinal BDS actually ) CNSR -> tte (CNSR structurally required TTE variable ADaM; EVNTDESC conventional universal) *SEQ column -> occds otherwise -> "REVIEW" placeholder + warning Errors ADSL file detected; simulate_study() requires exactly one. multiple ADSL candidates detected, file named exactly adsl.sas7bdat (case-insensitive) preferred; otherwise alphabetically-first candidate used. picked file kept rest dropped warning.

text: Within classified dataset, column-role inference picks : id_cols: USUBJID SUBJID present. treatment_cols (ADSL): ACTARM, ACTARMCD, ARM, ARMCD, TRTSEQP, TRTSEQA TRT##/TRT##/TRT##AL/TRT##P/TRT##PN/TRT##PL matches, plus TRT##(|P)GR\d* TRT##(|P)GR\d*N group variants. visit_cols (BDS): AVISIT, AVISITN, VISIT, VISITNUM, ATPT, ATPTN present. param_cols (BDS, TTE): PARAM, PARAMCD, PARCAT* columns. seq_col (OCCDS): first known domain-coded *SEQ column (AESEQ, CMSEQ, MHSEQ, PRSEQ, EXSEQ, DSSEQ); falls back first *SEQ column none present. censor_cols (TTE): CNSR, EVNTDESC, CNSDTDSC - emitted two detected. single CNSR flows regular column censor_cols omitted. ordered_col_sets: X/XN/XL groups two three variants base column name co-exist.

title: Glimpse a BDS dataset. — glimpse_bds

title: Glimpse a BDS dataset. — glimpse_bds

title: synadam 0.3.1
text: Add pkgdown GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml) builds documentation site deploys gh-pages branch, set site url _pkgdown.yml. Add R-hub v2 GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/rhub.yaml) multi-platform CRAN checks, dispatched via rhub::rhub_check().

title: synadam 0.3.0
text: Split study workflow glimpse phase simulate phase: add glimpse_study() simulate_study_from_summary(), allowing glimpse (needs real .sas7bdat files) run independently simulation. Fall back default seed 123 seed set study config, make seed argument optional generate_study_config() (also defaulting 123). Add .assert_required_id_cols() safeguard ID leakage. now errors USUBJID/SUBJID present data missing id_cols, ensuring subject IDs regenerated synthetically rather value-sampled real data. Refactor generate_study_config() take required output_dir (optional config_yaml_name), writing config directory alongside synthetic data saved. Drop synadam::/synadam::: syntax avoid CRAN self-::: NOTE. Add runnable roxygen @examples across exported glimpse_*/simulate_* functions. Introduce shared man-roxygen/setup_adam_datasets.R template stages bundled fixtures. Relocate MIT license text LICENSE.md switch LICENSE YEAR/COPYRIGHT HOLDER format, raise minimum R version 4.1.0 (native pipe), extend .Rbuildignore.

title: synadam 0.2.0
text: Keep PARAMCDs BDS simulation instead requiring paramcd_filter argument. Simulate flag columns based proportion “Y”/“N” values rather preserving exact positions.
